rice.quality_sensitive: High – grain quality heavily affected by high temperature at flowering stage

wheat.quality_sensitive: High – heat stress during grain filling reduces protein content

maize.quality_sensitive: Medium – drought at tasseling stage severely cuts yield

sugarcane.quality_sensitive: High – high humidity promotes red rot; cool nights improve sucrose

cotton.quality_sensitive: High – excess moisture causes boll rot; dry spells reduce fibre length

jute.quality_sensitive: Medium – needs high humidity; quality drops in prolonged water stress

groundnut.quality_sensitive: High – high humidity at pod-filling promotes aflatoxin contamination

soybean.quality_sensitive: Medium – excess rain promotes pod shattering and fungal diseases

mustard.quality_sensitive: Medium – warm conditions reduce oil content in seeds

sunflower.quality_sensitive: Medium – high humidity at flowering promotes downy mildew

tomato.quality_sensitive: Very High – temperature above 35°C causes flower drop and reduces lycopene

potato.quality_sensitive: High – high temperatures produce small, misshapen tubers; late blight risk in wet weather

onion.quality_sensitive: High – excess rain increases neck rot; moisture needed during bulb formation

garlic.quality_sensitive: Medium – high humidity causes storage rot; cool temps improve pungency

chilly.quality_sensitive: Very High – moisture stress reduces capsaicin; rain at harvest causes rot

brinjal.quality_sensitive: Medium – waterlogging causes root rot; heat stress affects fruit set

cabbage.quality_sensitive: Medium – warm temperatures split heads; adequate moisture essential

cauliflower.quality_sensitive: High – heat causes browning/riciness of curd; consistent moisture required

pea.quality_sensitive: High – heat reduces seed filling; powdery mildew in humid conditions

mango.quality_sensitive: Very High – dry spell at flowering promotes fruiting; rain during harvest causes anthracnose

banana.quality_sensitive: High – cold winds, waterlogging, and drought each reduce bunch weight significantly

coconut.quality_sensitive: Medium – water stress reduces copra yield; salinity lowers nut quality

tea.quality_sensitive: Very High – temperature, humidity, and elevation all influence flavour and aroma

coffee.quality_sensitive: Very High – shade, humidity, and altitude are critical for flavour profile

rubber.quality_sensitive: Low – mostly resilient; drought reduces latex yield

cardamom.quality_sensitive: Very High – humidity and shade are critical for aroma and oil content

turmeric.quality_sensitive: High – soil moisture and humidity affect curcumin content

ginger.quality_sensitive: High – waterlogging causes rhizome rot; good drainage increases oil content

lentil.quality_sensitive: Medium – high humidity promotes blight; drought at pod-fill reduces seed weight

chickpea.quality_sensitive: Medium – high humidity increases wilt/blight; cold nights improve seed protein

pigeonpea.quality_sensitive: Low – drought tolerant but waterlogging causes root rot

sesame.quality_sensitive: Medium – excess rain causes pod shattering; heat helps oil accumulation

bajra.quality_sensitive: Low – drought-tolerant; downy mildew risk in humid conditions

jowar.quality_sensitive: Low – tolerates dry spells; excess rain at harvest reduces grain quality

ragi.quality_sensitive: Low – adaptable; quality mostly unaffected except in severe drought

papaya.quality_sensitive: High – cold temperatures cause papaya ring spot; waterlogging causes root rot

pineapple.quality_sensitive: Medium – excess moisture reduces sweetness; drought reduces fruit size

grapes.quality_sensitive: Very High – humidity at harvest causes powdery mildew; temperature determines sugar/acid balance

moong.quality_sensitive: Medium – heat stress at pod fill reduces seed weight; humidity promotes Cercospora leaf spot

urad.quality_sensitive: Medium – waterlogging causes yellow mosaic virus; adequate moisture at flowering essential

cowpea.quality_sensitive: Low – drought tolerant; excess moisture promotes root rot and aphid infestation

horsegram.quality_sensitive: Low – very drought tolerant; excess humidity promotes fungal diseases

mothbean.quality_sensitive: Low – highly drought tolerant and suited to arid conditions; poor yield in waterlogged soils

okra.quality_sensitive: High – high humidity promotes yellow vein mosaic virus; drought stress causes poor pod setting and reduced quality

carrot.quality_sensitive: High – heat causes short, coarse, pale roots; cool temperatures improve colour and natural sweetness

spinach.quality_sensitive: High – heat causes bolting and bitterness; adequate moisture ensures tender nutrient-rich leaves

cucumber.quality_sensitive: Medium – waterlogging causes root rot; moisture stress reduces fruit size and marketable quality

bittergourd.quality_sensitive: Medium – waterlogging reduces yield; extreme heat increases bitterness beyond acceptable levels

bottlegourd.quality_sensitive: Low – fairly resilient; excess rain promotes fungal wilt and powdery mildew

pumpkin.quality_sensitive: Low – drought tolerant once established; excess moisture promotes powdery mildew and poor storage

sweetpotato.quality_sensitive: Medium – excess nitrogen causes poor tuberous root formation; adequate moisture at tuber development stage is critical

radish.quality_sensitive: Medium – heat causes pithiness and excessive pungency; cool temperatures give tender palatable roots

beetroot.quality_sensitive: Medium – heat reduces root colour and sweetness; adequate water prevents cracking and off-flavour

guava.quality_sensitive: High – high humidity promotes fruit rot and anthracnose; water stress at fruit development reduces size and quality

pomegranate.quality_sensitive: High – high humidity at harvest promotes fruit cracking; hot dry climate improves aril sweetness and colour

watermelon.quality_sensitive: Very High – excess rain dilutes sugar content; heat and sunshine increase lycopene and sweetness

orange.quality_sensitive: High – cool nights improve sweetness and peel colour; excess rain promotes citrus canker and reduces shelf life

lemon.quality_sensitive: Medium – waterlogging causes gummosis; dry periods before flowering improve fruit set and juice acidity

litchi.quality_sensitive: Very High – high temperature at flowering causes poor fruit set; humidity at harvest promotes pericarp browning and cracking

jackfruit.quality_sensitive: Medium – waterlogging not tolerated; drought at fruit development reduces fruit size and natural sweetness

sapota.quality_sensitive: Medium – dry conditions improve fruit sweetness; excess rain at harvest causes fungal issues and poor shelf life

strawberry.quality_sensitive: Very High – heat rapidly reduces flavour and shelf life; high humidity promotes grey mold (Botrytis)

coriander.quality_sensitive: Medium – excess humidity causes powdery mildew and stem rot; dry conditions improve seed essential oil content

cumin.quality_sensitive: Medium – high humidity promotes wilt and blight disease; cool dry weather significantly improves essential oil content

fenugreek.quality_sensitive: Medium – dry conditions improve seed alkaloid and diosgenin content; excess moisture causes dampening off

blackpepper.quality_sensitive: Very High – humidity and shade are critical for berry development and piperine content; drought causes premature berry shedding

cloves.quality_sensitive: Very High – adequate rainfall and humidity essential for eugenol (essential oil) content; drought causes flower bud shedding

castor.quality_sensitive: Medium – drought tolerant; excess moisture and waterlogging reduce oil content and promote root rot

safflower.quality_sensitive: Medium – cool dry weather improves seed oil content; high humidity promotes Alternaria blight and head rot

linseed.quality_sensitive: Medium – excess moisture increases rust disease susceptibility; dry conditions improve omega-3 fatty acid (ALA) content in seeds

barley.quality_sensitive: Medium – heat at grain filling reduces starch quality; cool dry harvest conditions preferred for food and malting grade

tobacco.quality_sensitive: Very High – soil type, moisture, temperature, and curing conditions all heavily influence alkaloid concentration and flavour profile

cashew.quality_sensitive: High – high humidity at flowering reduces nut set; a distinct dry season at flowering time is critical for yield and kernel quality

arecanut.quality_sensitive: High – koleroga (fruit rot) disease in excessive rainfall zones; adequate moisture at nut development stage is critical

marigold.quality_sensitive: Medium – excessive rain promotes dampening off and leaf blight; warm sunny days improve flower pigmentation and xanthophyll yield

drumstick.quality_sensitive: High – drought tolerant but excess waterlogging causes root rot; heat stress at pod stage reduces pod length, tenderness, and nutritional content

muskmelon.quality_sensitive: Very High – excess moisture sharply dilutes sugar (Brix) content; hot sunny days with low humidity are essential for sweetness, aroma, and skin colour

apple.preferred_soil: Well-drained Loamy, Sandy Loam, Clay Loam
apple.quality_sensitive: Very High – chilling hours below 7°C are critical for bud break; heat reduces colour development and firmness; high humidity promotes scab and powdery mildew

guar.quality_sensitive: Low – extremely drought tolerant; waterlogging causes root rot and premature leaf drop; dry finishing period improves gum content in seeds

niger.quality_sensitive: Medium – cool dry weather at maturity improves oil content; excess humidity at flowering promotes Alternaria leaf spot and reduces seed set

saffron.quality_sensitive: Very High – temperature, altitude, and soil drainage are extremely critical for crocin and safranal content; rain or humidity at flowering causes irreversible stigma damage

vanilla.quality_sensitive: Very High – shade, humidity, and soil organic matter heavily influence vanillin content; drought at bean maturity reduces aroma compound development

nutmeg.preferred_soil: Red Laterite, Sandy Loam, Forest Loam
nutmeg.quality_sensitive: Very High – high humidity and rainfall essential for kernel development; moisture stress at mace (aril) stage reduces essential oil content and commercial grade

taro.quality_sensitive: Medium – high soil moisture critical during corm development; heat stress reduces corm size; poor drainage causes corm rot and reduces starch content

ridgegourd.quality_sensitive: Low – heat tolerant; excess waterlogging causes fruit yellowing and spongy texture; regular moisture during fruit development maintains tenderness and marketable quality

amla.quality_sensitive: High – dry warm climate improves vitamin C and tannin content; excess humidity at fruiting promotes anthracnose and reduces shelf life of fresh fruits

custard_apple.quality_sensitive: High – high humidity at flowering impairs pollination; dry hot conditions improve fruit sweetness and pulp-to-seed ratio

tamarind.quality_sensitive: Medium – drought tolerant once established; excess humidity at pod maturity reduces tartaric acid content and promotes pod mold; dry season improves pulp quality

ashwagandha.quality_sensitive: High – semi-arid dry conditions significantly improve withanolide alkaloid content in roots; waterlogging causes root rot and chemical compound degradation

isabgol.quality_sensitive: Very High – cool dry weather at seed maturity is critical for husk quality and swelling factor; rain at harvest causes seed discolouration and husk mucilage loss

oats.quality_sensitive: Medium – cool moist climate improves beta-glucan content; heat stress at grain fill reduces grain weight and protein content; humid harvest reduces shelf life

amaranth.quality_sensitive: Medium – drought tolerant; excess humidity promotes damping off and stem rot; warm sunny conditions improve protein and squalene content in grain varieties

ivy_gourd.quality_sensitive: Low – heat and humidity tolerant; waterlogging causes root wilting; adequate soil moisture during fruiting prevents hardening and bitterness of fruits

french_bean.quality_sensitive: High – heat above 30°C causes flower drop and poor pod set; high humidity promotes rust and anthracnose; cool temperatures maintain pod tenderness and green colour

mint.quality_sensitive: Very High – cool temperatures and adequate soil moisture are critical for menthol content; heat stress and drought sharply reduce essential oil yield and quality

snakegourd.quality_sensitive: Low – tolerates heat well; waterlogging causes fruit cracking and fungal rot; consistent moisture during elongation phase maintains fruit tenderness and market grade

clusterbean.quality_sensitive: Medium – highly drought tolerant; excess humidity promotes blight and gum quality degradation in seed; poor drainage significantly reduces guar gum endosperm content

curry_leaf.quality_sensitive: High – heat and humidity promote rich essential oil (carbazole alkaloid) accumulation; drought causes leaf drop and reduced aroma; cold stress below 10°C severely damages foliage

makhana.quality_sensitive: High – stagnant shallow water bodies with rich organic bottom sediment are essential; heat stress during flowering reduces seed set; poor water quality causes off-flavour in popped kernels

stevia.quality_sensitive: Very High – cool temperatures with long daylight improve steviol glycoside (sweetness) concentration; heat and excess moisture cause glycoside degradation and bitter aftertaste

tulsi.quality_sensitive: High – warm sunny dry conditions maximise eugenol and ursolic acid content; waterlogging causes root rot; low temperatures below 10°C significantly suppress essential oil biosynthesis

aloe_vera.quality_sensitive: High – gel (acemannan) content peaks under mild drought stress; excess irrigation and humidity cause leaf yellowing, root rot, and dilution of active aloin and gel compounds

neem.quality_sensitive: Medium – tolerates extreme heat and drought; azadirachtin (biopesticide) content in seed kernels peaks in semi-arid dry conditions; waterlogging is not tolerated

hemp.quality_sensitive: High – cool temperatures during vegetative stage improve fibre quality and CBD content; excess humidity promotes grey mold and downy mildew; heat at flowering reduces seed oil yield

sword_bean.quality_sensitive: Low – tolerates moderate drought; waterlogging causes root rot; warm humid conditions support good vine growth though excess moisture at pod fill reduces seed protein concentration
